'''Madame Boble''' was a [[Bakuran]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] and an acquaintance of [[Gaeriel Captison]]. She took on the task of looking after Gaerial's daughter [[Malinza Thanas]] while Gaerial was away with the Bakuran fleet during the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' {{1stm}}
